items.title: Nova IT grupacija akvizirat će još nekoliko IT tvrtki – do kraja godine!
items.summary: Nova IT grupacija u koju je investirao fond privatnog kapitala Provectus Capital Partners, sada okuplja tri tvrtke uz preko 130 inženjera, a do kraja godine Burra planira nove akvizicije. Kako će to funkcionirati?

items.title: Legion LegalTech sues US over Anthropic Fable 5 and Mythos 5 shutdown
items.summary: Legion LegalTech says the export directive that shut down Fable 5 and Mythos 5 worldwide has done “immediate, irreparable, and existential” harm to its business. US legal-technology company has sued the federal government over the directive that, two weeks ago, forced Anthropic to switch off its two
